summary: Generated comprehensive architecture overview for CloudRise CRM platform. Covers 6 projects, 19 DB tables, ~55 API endpoints, 15 frontend pages, 4 CI/CD workflows. Saved locally (no Atlassian connection configured).
output: Architecture overview generated and saved to architecture/2026-03-07-architecture-overview.md. No Confluence publishing — Cloud ID not configured. Key findings: Fully serverless on Cloudflare (Pages, Workers, D1, R2). Three auth contexts (Admin, Portal, Client). ZUGFeRD/Factur-X e-invoicing compliance. MCP server for AI database access. Automated D1 backups with 90-day R2 retention. 25 database migrations, 19 tables, SQLite triggers for auto-calculation.
